tuning: E A D G B E

A------2(h)4----[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]B[/ch]
well it's a long way from Star, Mississippi[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
to the big stage i'm singin on tonight[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
and sometimes the butterflies still get me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
when i'm in the spotlight[/tab]


chorus:
[tab]            [ch]E[/ch]                    [ch]B[/ch]
Cause a Mississippi girl don't change her ways[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]B[/ch]     
just cause everybody knows her name[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]B[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch] 
ain't big headed from a little bit of fame[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]
i still like wearin my old ball cap[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]
ride my kids around piggy back[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]
they might know me all around the world[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
but ya'll i'm still a Mississippi girl[/tab]



[tab]        [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
well i spent a few weeks in California[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]B[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch] 
they put my face on the big movie screen[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
but that don't mean i've forgotten where i came from[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]F#[/ch]
thats just me chasin dreams, yeah[/tab]
